subcodes.title: Siyasiyyih (The Art of Divine Polity - Treatise on Politics)
subcodes.first_line: Adoration and praise beseem the Spirit of Purity that has laid the foundation of creation with the sole object
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش و نیایش پاک یزدانیرا سزا که بنیان آفرینش را بر ظهورات کمالات مقدسه عالم
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice and wrath of God, @spiritual springtime, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
